title: Tutoring Center Extended Hours
transcript: Good news for students. The Academic Support Center will be extending its hours during final exam preparation week, from December 8th to December 14th. The center will remain open until 9 PM on weekdays and from 10 AM to 6 PM on weekends. Tutoring services are available for all core subjects including mathematics, writing, sciences, and foreign languages. Walk-ins are welcome, but appointments are recommended and can be booked through the Academic Support Center website. Free coffee and light snacks will be provided in the study lounge during extended hours.

questions.stem: What is the purpose of this announcement?
options: To inform students about extended hours for finals preparation
To announce the opening of a new study lounge
questions.explanation: The announcement is about the Academic Support Center extending its hours during final exam preparation week.

questions.stem: What subjects are mentioned as available for tutoring?
options: Mathematics, writing, sciences, and foreign languages
All subjects offered at the university
questions.explanation: Tutoring services are available for mathematics, writing, sciences, and foreign languages.

questions.stem: What is recommended for students who want tutoring?
questions.explanation: Walk-ins are welcome, but appointments are recommended and can be booked through the website.
